TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Indonesia, title = Indonesia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Indonesia} }

S.FORM: Indonesia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 5 00 S, 120 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,904,569 sq km (maki' tay 15ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,811,569 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 93,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 258,316,051. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 31.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 51.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 17.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Jakarta. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 17 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Joko Widodo, aring ryax 20 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Indonesia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 5 00 S, 120 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,904,569 sq km (maki' tay 15ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,811,569 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 93,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 258,316,051. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 31.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 51.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 17.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Jakarta. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 17 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Joko Widodo, aring ryax 20 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: in*ones~…ēia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** s~…ē, *** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *,***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *,***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a *akarta. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *oko wi*o*o, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
